title: Zwharton
compiled_truth: Zwharton is an external contact at [Dawray](companies/dawray). Over the corpus period (2000-10-09 to 2001-12-06), Zwharton sent 15 and received 43 emails, totalling 58 interactions. Top correspondents: [Martin Cuilla](people/martin-cuilla) (8), [Mcuilla](people/mcuilla) (7).
